## About

Suraj Kumar Chandravanshi is a Delhi-based SEO and Digital Marketing Specialist with 4+ years of experience helping B2B and B2C brands grow through organic search, paid advertising, and content marketing.

- Name: Suraj Kumar Chandravanshi
- Location: Delhi, India
- Role: SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist
- Email: surajkrchandravanshi@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/surajkofficial/
- Open to: Full-time roles, freelance, international opportunities (Germany, Australia, UAE)

## Services

- SEO strategy, keyword research, on-page and off-page optimisation
- Google Ads and Meta paid advertising
- Social media strategy and content management
- WordPress publishing and marketing reporting
